samples:
I close my eyes and see
The one that got away
It's our time now to be
In each other's hands


I open wide to breathe
And taste the bitter pain
When memories are so clear
No escaping from the chains


Sacrificial act, how far will you go?
To obtain your trophy
If you think I'll let you
Have the ending that you want

Release me from this lonely world
I swear it must be hell
To have lived without
The gift of true love
Guilty until proven innocent
By those who create these
Twisted, twisted ways


Laying your guilt and blame
On someone else is a way out
Of the mental torture you created
For yourself and those around you


I ask you why you do what you do
You must be out of your mind
A waste of life
An excuse to deny what's real


I close my eyes and see
The one that got away
It's our time now to be
In each other's hands

I come to ask
What took you so long?
To become what you are
A waste of human life


When will it end?
On your hands and knees
You crawl
Searching through the graves

In time you'll find
What you deserve
The pain is just the beginning
Of the end of your existence


Life ends so fast
Don't let it be in vain
Teach what you know not
When tomorrow comes you'll see
Your life goes down the drain

And the way you touch me


You drive me crazy with your kisses
Your taste, it is addictive
You are so naive
In need of lessons from
This world of passion


Kiss the one you want
When and how you want
Taste the poison
That took control of your mind


A word of advice
Take it from the heart
Do you want to stay
In this stupid, stupid world?


Reaching inside yourself
Find what you feel
For answers to the questions
That may seem so cliche

I become so uninhibited
The way that you speak
And the way you touch me

Your taste, it is addictive

Taste the poison

The dead come forth from their graves
Stare your eyes with fear

Bodies fall onto the altar
A human sacrifice is what's required
Now it's your turn to die


Chosen one
You will not survive
Chosen one
Die tonight

Body melting

The writing of songs
Is a way to release aggression

Release the flesh

In the dark of night

I know the truth is out, now you're in

Some people may not understand
But I know the power of mental pain
The kind that is created by a twisted mind
A mind whose existence should be a crime

Will turn your life into a fucking Hell
When things fall into place, you will see

Never to trust the mentally insane

Approach the image filled with fear
As your eyes stare into the mirror
A premonition grows deep inside your mind
Of what to expect when you open your eyes


Observe your reflection as it stands
A perfect doppelganger of the one who was framed
Reaching into the minds of those that shined
To create a monster out of people that were blind


Evil lurks within its twisted shell
Controlling every aspect of your life
Commandments which cannot be condoned
By anyone who knew the real you


Life as a corpse is what to expect
When you rise from the dead and are
Dominated by the flesh
When the dead inherit the world

An excuse for weakness
Will not be taken

The pain will begin
